The Problem With Steel

Steel Reinforcement
Fails Over Time.

01
🔧

Corrosion Destroys Structure

Steel rusts under moisture and chemical exposure, causing concrete spalling, cracking, and compromised structural integrity — often invisible until it is too late.

02
⚖️

Heavy Steel Adds Cost

Steel’s high dead load increases transportation, manpower, and foundation costs — directly eating into project margins on every job site.

03
💸

Maintenance Kills Profit

Long-term repair and rehabilitation expenses for steel-reinforced structures reduce project ROI and create recurring liability for developers and contractors.

The RebarX Advantage

RebarX GFRP Rebars –
Built for Long-Term Performance

Engineered with Glass Fibre Reinforced Polymer technology, RebarX rebars outperform steel in corrosive environments while reducing project costs from day one.

4× Lighter Than SteelLower handling & labour cost
1000+ MPa TensileHigh-performance reinforcement

Lower Lifecycle CostUp to 40% long-term savings

Real-World Applications

Where RebarX GFRP Performs Best

Proven across diverse construction environments demanding corrosion resistance and long-term structural integrity.

ETP & STP Tanks

Superior chemical resistance in effluent and sewage treatment plants where steel corrodes rapidly in harsh chemical and moisture environments.

Swimming Pools

Chlorine-resistant and moisture-proof — GFRP rebars ensure crack-free, long-lasting pool structures with zero corrosion staining.

Road Construction

Lightweight and high-tensile, ideal for highway and bridge deck reinforcement — reducing dead load while extending pavement life significantly.

RCC Precast Boundaries & Slabs

Lightweight precast elements with GFRP reduce transportation and erection costs while delivering superior corrosion-free performance.

Colony Boundary Walls

Rust-free precast compound walls for residential colonies — zero maintenance, no spalling, lasting aesthetic quality over decades.

PEB Slabs & Flooring

Ideal for industrial and PEB structure slabs, flooring, and foundations — eliminates corrosion risk in warehouses, factories, and large-span industrial buildings.
